tag_descriptions.BLE Configuration: Configure the BLE scanner. Enable or disable scanning, set the scan interval, apply RSSI and service UUID filters, and configure protocol-specific filters for iBeacon, AltBeacon, Eddystone, and generic BLE devices.
tag_descriptions.Control Commands: Start and stop BLE scanning on the reader. BLE must be configured and enabled before starting.
tag_descriptions.BLE Data Events: Review the BLE tag and beacon data events published to the configured data endpoints after BLE scanning starts.
tag_descriptions.BLE Status: Read the reader's operational status. The BLE status response reports scanner state, scan start time, and beacon counts by protocol.
